mapper.select: SELECT id, meeting_id as meetingId, created_by as createdBy, title, amount, description, receipt_url as receiptUrl, status, created_at as createdAt, approved_at as approvedAt FROM woorido.expense_requests WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE woorido.expense_requests er SET status = 'REJECTED', approved_at = NULL WHERE status = 'VOTING' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM woorido.expense_votes ev WHERE ev.expense_request_id = er.id AND ev.status = 'EXPIRED' )
